description: Deterministic directive-signature fixture (v0.4, §9.7). The Hub MUST reproduce `v1` from JCS(inbound_signed_context) + HMAC-SHA256(test_key); the context binds `payload_sha256` = lowercase-hex SHA-256 of JCS({directive: <content>}) plus the top-level `from`/`id`/`to`. Recomputing the digest from `directive` MUST equal signed_context.payload_sha256.
obligation: Reproduce header `v1`; reproduce `payload_sha256` from `directive`; reject a tampered inbound_signed_context; reject a replayed jti within the window.

directive.title: Pause deploys until the incident is resolved
directive.body: We are mid-incident on prod. Hold all deploys until I say otherwise.

payload_canonical_jcs: {"directive":{"body":"We are mid-incident on prod. Hold all deploys until I say otherwise.","priority":"urgent","tags":["incident","deploy-freeze"],"title":"Pause deploys until the incident is resolved"}}
